If someone you love was hurt in an 18-wheeler crash on Houston's highways, the days right after the accident are the most critical — and the most overwhelming.

Black box data from the truck can be overwritten. Dashcam footage disappears. Driver logs get altered. Insurance adjusters for large trucking companies move fast, and they are not on your side.

That is why we put together a full victim guide specifically for Houston 18-wheeler crash survivors. It covers your rights under Texas law, what evidence matters most, how FMCSA regulations affect your case, and how WreckMatch connects injured people with experienced truck accident attorneys — with no upfront cost and no pressure.

You do not have to figure this out alone. Hundreds of law firms are ready to fight for you.

reddit_title: Hit by an 18-wheeler in Houston — what evidence should I be trying to preserve right now?
reddit_body:
Truck accident cases in Texas — especially 18-wheelers — move fast on the defense side. The trucking company's insurance team is often on scene within hours, and certain data like the truck's black box (ECM) can be overwritten or lost if you do not act quickly. If you were recently in a crash, your first priority should be sending a spoliation letter through an attorney to preserve that data, along with dashcam footage, driver logs, and inspection records.

FMCSA regulations add a layer of complexity that standard car accident cases do not have. Hours-of-service violations, improper loading, and maintenance failures can all affect liability — and multiple parties (the driver, the carrier, even the cargo company) may share responsibility. Texas also follows a modified comparative fault rule, so anything the defense can pin on you reduces your recovery.

If you are trying to find an attorney who actually handles commercial truck cases rather than general personal injury, a free matching service like wreckmatch.com can connect you with firms that specialize in this area in Houston. No upfront cost, and you are not locked in. Time is genuinely the biggest factor here, so do not wait.
